user.title: Connect to Teletask Central Unit
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Teletask central unit. Paste your config.json content in the last field.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Teletask central unit. Check the IP address and port.
error.invalid_json: The configuration JSON is invalid. Please check the format.

abort.already_configured: This Teletask central unit is already configured.
